title: Reggae Island Chill
summary: 76 BPM classic reggae - off-beat guitar skanks, deep walking bass, horn melody, island vibe.
prompt: A laid-back classic reggae instrumental at 76 BPM. Off-beat clean guitar skanks on the upstroke, deep walking electric bass underpinning the groove, one-drop drum pattern with the kick on the 3, warm Hammond organ swells, melodic horn-section line (sax + trumpet). Classic 70s Caribbean reggae groove - relaxed, sun-soaked, instrumental.
